meaning: I bow to the Lord who dwells in all hearts
benefits: Removes obstacles, dissolves karmic bondage, bestows liberation

meaning: I bow to Shiva, the auspicious one within all existence
benefits: Purifies the soul, destroys ego, grants divine grace and moksha

meaning: I bow to Ganesha, the remover of all obstacles
benefits: Clears path of obstacles, bestows wisdom, ensures auspicious beginnings

meaning: I bow to Saraswati, the goddess of wisdom and creative expression
benefits: Grants eloquence, sharpens intellect, awakens creativity and memory

meaning: I invoke Mahalakshmi, the goddess of abundance and divine grace
benefits: Attracts prosperity, purifies karmic debt, opens channels of abundance

meaning: I bow to Durga, the invincible one who protects all existence
benefits: Destroys negative forces, bestows fierce protection and inner strength

meaning: I bow to Hanuman, the embodiment of devotion and divine strength
benefits: Grants courage, removes fear, purifies the mind through selfless devotion

meaning: I bow to Surya, the radiant source of all light and life
benefits: Awakens vitality, clears confusion, bestows clarity of vision and purpose

devanagari: ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम् उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय माऽमृतात्
transliteration: Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrityor Mukshiya Mamritat
meaning: We worship the three-eyed Lord who nourishes and increases the sweetness of life
benefits: Conquers death and disease, bestows longevity and fearlessness

devanagari: ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्
transliteration: Om Bhur Bhuva Svaha Tat Savitur Varenyam Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat
meaning: We meditate on the divine radiance of the supreme light; may it illuminate our intellect
benefits: Awakens cosmic intelligence, purifies mind and soul, connects to universal consciousness

meaning: I bow to Narayana, the sustainer who pervades all of creation
benefits: Bestows inner peace, liberation, and aligns the seeker with cosmic order

meaning: I bow to Kali, the destroyer of time and the liberator from illusion
benefits: Destroys ego and ignorance, grants fearlessness and swift liberation

meaning: I bow to Sri Rama, the ideal of righteousness and divine virtue
benefits: Bestows harmony, righteousness, and the protection of divine dharma

meaning: I bow to the fierce Rudra, lord of storms and transformation
benefits: Purifies deep karma, grants fearlessness and fierce inner strength

devanagari: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे
transliteration: Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundayai Vicche
meaning: I invoke Chamunda, the fierce aspect of Devi who destroys all evil
benefits: Eliminates malevolent forces, bestows invincibility and divine protection

meaning: I bow to Lord Krishna, the supreme being of joy and divine love
benefits: Opens the heart, bestows divine joy, dissolves separation from the eternal

devanagari: ॐ उग्रं वीरं महाविष्णुं ज्वलन्तं सर्वतोमुखम्
transliteration: Om Ugram Viram Mahavishnum Jvalantam Sarvatomukham
meaning: I meditate on the fierce, heroic Narasimha, blazing and all-pervading
benefits: Destroys evil, grants protection to devotees in times of great fear

meaning: I bow to Venkateshwara, the Lord of the sacred hill who fulfils all wishes
benefits: Fulfils desires, bestows material and spiritual abundance and blessings

devanagari: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं श्रीं त्रिपुरसुन्दर्यै नमः
transliteration: Om Aim Hrim Shrim Tripurasundaryai Namaha
meaning: I bow to Tripura Sundari, the most beautiful in all three worlds
benefits: Bestows radiant beauty of being, divine love, and blissful liberation

meaning: I bow to Parvati, the daughter of the mountain and mother of the universe
benefits: Strengthens family bonds, deepens devotion, bestows grace and inner beauty

meaning: Om, born in the sacred grove of reeds — the seed mantra of Skanda
benefits: Bestows victory in all endeavours, removes obstacles on the spiritual path

devanagari: ॐ वेदात्मनाय विद्महे हिरण्यगर्भाय धीमहि तन्नो ब्रह्म प्रचोदयात्
transliteration: Om Vedatmanaya Vidmahe Hiranyagarbhaya Dhimahi Tanno Brahma Prachodayat
meaning: We know the Self of the Vedas; we meditate on the golden womb of creation
benefits: Awakens creative intelligence, aligns with cosmic will and divine purpose

meaning: I bow to Bhairava, the terrible and magnificent guardian of time
benefits: Protects against malevolent forces, bestows fearlessness and night-time protection

devanagari: ॐ तत्पुरुषाय विद्महे महासेनाय धीमहि तन्नः स्कन्दः प्रचोदयात्
transliteration: Om Tatpurushaya Vidmahe Mahasenaya Dhimahi Tannah Skandah Prachodayat
meaning: We know that Supreme Being; we meditate on the great general of the gods
benefits: Grants victory, courage, and the power to cut through illusion with divine wisdom

meaning: I bow to Mother Ganga, the sacred river that purifies all existence
benefits: Purifies karmic accumulations, bestows healing and spiritual cleansing

devanagari: ॐ दिगम्बराय विद्महे योगीश्वराय धीमहि तन्नो दत्तः प्रचोदयात्
transliteration: Om Digambaraya Vidmahe Yogishwaraya Dhimahi Tanno Dattah Prachodayat
meaning: We know the sky-clad Lord; we meditate on the master of yoga
benefits: Bestows non-dual awareness, dissolves the illusion of separateness

devanagari: ॐ यक्षाय कुबेराय वैश्रवणाय धनधान्याधिपतये धनधान्यसमृद्धिं मे देहि दापय स्वाहा
transliteration: Om Yakshaya Kuberaya Vaishravanaya Dhanadhanyadi Pataye Dhanadhanya Samriddhim Me Dehi Dapaya Svaha
meaning: I invoke Kubera, lord of yakshas and keeper of divine treasures
benefits: Opens doors to material abundance, financial protection, and prosperity

meaning: I offer this oblation to Agni, the divine fire of transformation
benefits: Purifies through sacred fire, transforms karma, strengthens digestive and vital energy

devanagari: ॐ श्री राम जय राम जय जय राम
transliteration: Om Shri Ram Jay Ram Jay Jay Ram
meaning: Victory to Shri Rama — the chant of Saint Tukaram that liberates through pure devotion
benefits: Fills the heart with devotion, grants victory over the lower self

devanagari: ॐ नमः पार्वतीपतये हर हर महादेव
transliteration: Om Namah Parvatipataye Hara Hara Mahadeva
meaning: I bow to the lord of Parvati — Hara, Hara, the great god who takes away all suffering
benefits: Harmonises Shiva and Shakti energies within, bestows bliss and liberation
